REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2390 30th Ave, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Wintle for Cindy Conwell.

Mr. Wintle stated that the property had already been sold as there was a pending foreclosure from Wells Fargo Bank. All pending petitions were moved to June 30, 2008. Mr. Wintle is to notify all parties. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2390 30th Ave, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made.
The Court ordered the matter off calendar.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: R. Hill; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/C. Herbert.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2390 30th Ave, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Continued To Apr-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Wintle for Cindy Conwell and Donald Anderson.

Mr. Wintle reported that no appraisal had been done and no Probate Referee had been appointed. The Court informed Mr. Wintle that a reappraisal was needed, and that notice to the buyer and the buyer's agent needed to be served. The matter was continued to April 7, 2008. Mr. Wintle will submit a declaration and a serve notice.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.
